title: Describe emotions carefully
subtitle: Use a little, quite, and really.
overview: Use a little, quite, and really.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
我有点紧张，但准备好了。
She seemed quite upset after the meeting.
会议后她看起来相当难过。
How do you feel before speaking English?
说英语前你感觉怎么样？
I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
我有点紧张，但准备好了。

items.en: I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
items.zh: 我有点紧张，但准备好了。

items.en: She seemed quite upset after the meeting.

items.en: How do you feel before speaking English?
items.zh: 说英语前你感觉怎么样？

items.en: I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
items.zh: 我有点紧张，但准备好了。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: How do you feel before speaking English?
lines.zh: 说英语前你感觉怎么样？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
lines.zh: 我有点紧张，但准备好了。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: She seemed quite upset after the meeting.
lines.zh: 会议后她看起来相当难过。

items.en: I am a little nervous, but I am ready.
items.zh: 我有点紧张，但准备好了。

items.en: She seemed quite upset after the meeting.
items.zh: 会议后她看起来相当难过。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
